scripts.dev:ui: concurrently "wrangler dev --remote" "cd ui && VITE_API_BASE=https://mailzen.dice-deli-dev.workers.dev npm run dev -- --host"
scripts.d1:results:clear: wrangler d1 execute mailzen-db --remote --command "DELETE FROM mail_results;"
scripts.d1:results:latest: wrangler d1 execute mailzen-db --remote --command "SELECT id, sender, sender_id, sender_domain, processed_at FROM mail_results ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;"
scripts.ops:refresh: npm run d1:results:clear && npm run run:trigger
